Red Dragon
Yarn of Truth Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Dangerous Link
Links the artifact owner to a random enemy for 5 sec. All buffs are removed from the enemy, all debuffs are removed from the artifact owner. While the link is active, all healing received by the enemy is also applied to the artifact owner. Additionally, while the link is active, the enemy takes 150% magic damage dealt to the artifact owner.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
